summary.intent: Refactor checkpoint-related server routes to accept `localPath` as a query parameter instead of using the inefficient `repoForCheckpoint` method that scanned multiple databases. Also fix a bug where Claude's planning text before tool calls was not visible in SessionDetail.
summary.outcome: All three checkpoint detail routes now accept `?localPath=` and skip cross-DB scanning. The frontend threads `localPath` through navigation state into `CheckpointDetail`. Planning text emitted before tool calls is now folded into the thinking block on `ClaudeTurnCard` rather than being silently overwritten.

repo: The `repoForCheckpoint` method was querying multiple databases to find which repo owns a checkpoint â€” a known inefficiency now eliminated.

Claude Code JSONL can emit multiple events for the same message ID: one text-only event (planning), one tool-use-only event, then another text-only event (summary). The last text overwrote the first in `logEventsToEvents`.
The gossamer server uses a per-repo SQLite DB pattern; `findRepo(localPath)` is the direct lookup path once `localPath` is known.
There was a pre-existing bug: `allLogEvents` was querying `repoDb` instead of `db` (the primary DB where log events are always written).
The `Checkpoint` interface on the frontend did not previously carry `localPath`; it had to be added to both the server response and the TypeScript interface.

code.finding: Deleted `repoForCheckpoint` entirely; all 3 detail routes now use `?localPath=` query param to call `findRepo(localPath)` directly.
Checkpoint list response now includes `localPath: repoDir ?? null` per checkpoint so callers always have the value.
`Checkpoint` interface gained `localPath: string | null`; `fetchCheckpoint`, `fetchCheckpointDiff`, `fetchCheckpointDiffStats` each accept optional `localPath` and append it as a query string.

`logEventsToEvents` had a simple assignment for `lastAssistantText`, causing later text to overwrite earlier planning text. Fix: when a new text block arrives after tool uses in the same turn, accumulate it into `lastAssistantThinking` so it appears in the collapsible thinking block.
Now reads `localPath` from `useLocation().state` and passes it to both fetch calls.
`CheckpointRow` gained a `localPath` prop; render site passes `session?.repoRoot` and includes it in navigate state.

workflow: A first attempt at the planning-text fix (emitting a synthetic Stop event) was reverted as too noisy â€” folding into the thinking block was preferred for UI cleanliness.
Both `tsc` build and type-check were run after each major change set to catch errors early.

friction: Multiple reads of `server.ts` were required before the full picture of all three detail routes was clear, suggesting the file is large and the routes are spread out.
Tracking down the planning-text bug required querying the SQLite DB directly and inspecting raw event sequences, since the symptom (missing text in UI) gave no direct pointer to the cause.
The first fix approach (synthetic Stop event) had to be thrown away after user feedback, adding rework.
open_items: The pre-existing `allLogEvents` bug (querying `repoDb` instead of `db`) was noted at session start but it is unclear if it was committed or remains as an uncommitted change alongside the index.html build artifact.
No test coverage was added for the refactored checkpoint routes or the `logEventsToEvents` planning-text fix.
